import React from 'react'; const BuyerBrowse = ({ onBack, items }) => { return (

Market (बाजार)

{items.length === 0 ? (
No crops available right now.
(अद्याप कोणतेही पीक उपलब्ध नाही)
) : ( items.map((crop) => (
📦

{crop.name}

{crop.qty}

{crop.price}

)) )}
); }; export default BuyerBrowse;
